title: test-plan.md frontmatter
description: Schema for the YAML body emitted by the test-architecture skill. Consumed by tdd-impl-plan and (transitively) tdd-execute. See .claude/skills/test-architecture/SKILL.md for semantics.

spec.description: Linear issue id of the parent spec (e.g. ENG-XXXX).

slice.description: Slice identifier — Linear sub-issue id of the slice this test-plan belongs to. Optional. When present, tdd-execute uses it to derive the workspace path .tdd-execute/<slice>/. Pattern allows a bare ENG-id (whole-spec slices) or a sub-issue id (ENG-XXXX-N).

tests.description: One row per test. Validation rules in SKILL.md 'Required slots' are enforced by the test-architecture skill before emission; the schema only enforces shape. F-SCHEMA-2 (dry-run §4): exactly one row must have outermost: true.

layer.description: Canonical 11-name layer taxonomy from 05-doc-audit.md 'Proposed Canonical Taxonomy'. Must stay in sync with impl-plan.schema.json#/properties/steps/items/properties/layer/enum (single source of truth — see F-SCHEMA-1). No aliases.

failureModeClass.description: Single failure mode this test pins (Mandate #8). Definitions in SKILL.md 'Failure-mode classes'.

externalDependencyKind.description: How the external dependency is represented in the test. 'fake-with-self-test' requires an explicit self-test referenced in contract_check (per ENG-4934 T1).

service.description: Name of the external service (e.g. VAIS, Anthropic, Supabase, Sentry).

contract_check.description: What contract the test wires up. For fake-with-self-test, must reference where the self-test lives (per ENG-4934 T1).

id.description: Stable test id used by tdd-impl-plan and tdd-execute (e.g. T1, T2).

assertion_shape.description: One sentence of behaviour, never an implementation detail. If you need two sentences, split the test (Mandate #8).

rationale.description: Cite at least one decision dimension (behaviour / confidence / speed / isolation) and at least one ENG-id or memory entry where applicable.

ac_ids.description: Acceptance criteria this test covers. m:n with AC per 08-spec-flow-trace.md observation 2.

external_dependencies.description: Empty / omitted if the test has no external dependency.

outermost.description: Exactly one row per user-visible behaviour must have outermost: true (Mandate #2, #11).

mock_can_lie_note.description: REQUIRED when any external_dependencies[].kind == 'mocked'. Answers: 'what contract drift between this mock and production would this test fail to surface?' (ENG-4922 / ENG-4934 T1). Generic notes ('n/a', 'nothing') indicate the audit was skipped. minLength is hoisted (F-SCHEMA-6) so the empty string never validates even if a future schema edit removes the conditional gate below.
